.status-bar.background: rgb(252, 250, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--embed-border-start: 2px solid hsl(from hsl(175, 57%, 33%) calc(h - 3) calc(s * 1.02) calc(l * 1.15))
